evidence_refs.quote: # SSA-Mamba Retrieval Bridge: Content-Routed SSM Memory for Million-Token Evidence

claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: A context-aware routed bridge preserves exact joint recall at 10k and 100k tokens with 1.0 accuracy, but its 1M-token result depends on memory capacity: underprovisioned routing reaches only 0.4 accuracy across 20 trials, while a larger routed-memory configuration reaches 1.0 accuracy in a single 1M-token trial.
